title: PokeCenter PCs (Cobblemon Addon)
description: Adds a PC to every village PokeCenter
body:
This *very simple* addon adds a PC to every village PokeCenter. Similar to PokeCenter Healing Machines, breaking the PC in the PokeCenter will not drop it, but rather materials involved in crafting it.

![PC in a PokeCenter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96cc40faa90a22278881d1edaf2e5e6c95537a08.png)

# How to install a datapack:
1. Download the .zip file, and **do not** extract it.
2. Navigate to your Minecraft world's folder, which can be done through clicking `[Edit]` and `[Open World Folder]` in the world selection screen.
3. Navigate to the folder called `[datapacks]`, and drop the .zip file inside of that folder.
